reviews.review_msg: Prof Zhang is really kind and helpful, he delivered the contents to his students very well and exams are pretty fair (but just be careful of 50% Final)!!!

The course is based mostly on exams, and the professor goes through mock midterms and finals through YouTube videos, and you will be given a cheat sheet. The only thing I didn't like was that the professor didn't use Canvas to upload assignments or grades. I highly recommend this course for a chill time and good content to learn without stressing.

George makes this class much easier than it should be. he is a good professor who cares about his students. makes exams very fair and clear. does not try to make things overly complicated. pretty funny guy keeps lectures interesting. overall would take a class with him again. only thing i dont like is that he doesnt use canvas for assignments
Very caring about this class, did not care about spending extra time on youtube videos to ensure we understood. hes a good guy

George was a pretty bad professor. He obviously doesn't take in any feedback from the previous semester or improve his teaching; we had the same issues as the semester before during exams. Uses the same lectures from previous terms even if there are mistakes. Slides disorganized and really dull. The curve is high so watch out. TAs are terrible too

The class was very disorganized. Assignments would take me 10 hours to finish because there were so many questions to do. Both midterm and final were poorly run and all multiple choice. Professor was not accessible and TAs were not very helpful either. I would not recommend this prof.

I did not enjoy prof Zhang. He taught the class asynchronously which was great because I could watch the lectures at 1.5x speed. Stats is already a bland, uninteresting topic for me and his lecture style did not help

The TAs were rude and unhelpful. The (online) exams were run poorly. The exam questions had mistakes making the questions logically impossible. All of the lectures were prerecorded YouTube videos, so I'm not sure what George was doing all semester. Would avoid if possible, but if not it's just one course.

His midterm was terrible - had 17 unanswerable questions cause the graphs were missing so he took them all out which made all the other questions worth so much more. The final was also a mess - prof and TAs were disorganized and unprofessional and refused to answer questions. The material itself is okay but the profs and TAs were just a mess

DO NOT TAKE HIM - he does not reply to emails at all - both his midterm and final had extreme technical difficulties - reuses notes and instructions from the previous semester resulting in lots of confusion about the logistics fo assignments and exams - he has sent out the wrong notes on multiple occasions - unlearned material on some assignments

The course itself was OK, but the real problem was the prof. He made 4 mistakes in his mid MC questions, decided to give one extra mark for everyone, but when the TA and I discovered 3 more mistakes, he refused to address the issue and did not want to discuss it with me, and I lost three valuable. He was also very rude to me because of it

DO NOT TAKE THIS PROF! I basically just self study the whole semester while trying to figure out how to do question from other ppl's youtube videos. He just read off the slides on his ppt and didnt even explain the concept. His assignment are difficult and I have to spent like 10+ hours on it every week because he cant teach.

If you are good at teaching yourself off of youtube videos with no professor interaction this professor is for you. I had troubles understanding the concepts but clearly youtube does not reply to you when you ask a question. Professor was absent all semester long and refused to reply to emails over the term. I cant believe SFU allows such behaviour

I taught myself this course from his youtube videos that were recorded in May. Half the time I didn't know where the answers were coming from as he was not there to answer my questions. This course definitely requires more interaction but the way this prof does it he is never present on email or canvas or lectures. Go a different route.

This class is basically teaching yourself off of youtube videos. The professor is absent all semester long and refuses to reply to your emails. The TA Ben is also very arrogant and is useless as he does not make any sense. There is clear evidence the class cheats and has academic honesty issues. Choose a different Prof, this is not worth it!

He doesn't teach. All the lectures are pre recorded from a few semesters ago. He literally just reads off the slides. It's so obvious that people cheat in the class. In-person 336 average was 63%, and and online the midterm average was 82%. How is this remotely fair? Embarrassed to be paying this much money for such poor quality of education.
Can you believe that for a math course, all assignments are required to be typed in Word instead of handwriting? This is ridiculous.
Good prof! Teaches content slowly but easy enough class. 6 assignments throughout the sem, if you can do them youre good.
Liking him :) He is not tough and he is super patient to answer students' comments. He explains the lecture so detailed but you might find his teaching is kinda slow. Assignments are due every week .
He goes over everything really slowly and gives lots of examples in class. The exams aren't that hard but you have to watch out for the curve.

Overall pretty good. Bad things that were really annoying: - no criteria for assignments - never got the assignments back or grades (week 11 right now and nothing) - the TAs he has don't respond to emails - doesn't use Canvas

Very thick accent, and given that some of the content was complicated I found it pretty frustrating some days when it was difficult to fully understand him. Other than that, he's a nice guy. A few assignments, midterm was easy but the final was significantly more difficult and was worth most of your grade. So, study well in advance for that!
The course was okay overall but you have to work hard for a good grade.
Great GPA boost! Hi weight on easy homework. Exams super easy because he always uses the same exams. Lectures unnecessary if you know his exam. I wish he taught more courses.

Lectures, exams are easiest compared with other profs. Not too much works to do. However, he curves the class and usually the avg is 85% or higher.  Therefore it's easy to get a high mark but also easy to get a grade under the average. The laziest, most helpless and non-responsible prof to students I've ever met. Never or rarely replies email btw.

Clear prof, does his best to make lectures intriguing and takes ridiculously long breaks.  However, a lot of students felt like he was only there to collect his paycheque. He is rarely in office, doesn't respond to emails, doesn't answer questions very well and doesn't tell you how well you did on assignments. Tests are long.
